mapper.select: SELECT behavior_type as behaviorType, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_behavior WHERE userid = #{userid} GROUP BY behavior_type

SELECT ub2.goodid as goodid, COUNT(*) as similarity FROM user_behavior ub1 JOIN user_behavior ub2 ON ub1.userid = ub2.userid AND ub1.goodid != ub2.goodid WHERE ub1.goodid = #{goodid} AND ub1.behavior_type IN ('buy', 'favorite') AND ub2.behavior_type IN ('buy', 'favorite') GROUP BY ub2.goodid ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ub2.userid as userid, COUNT(*) as similarity FROM user_behavior ub1 JOIN user_behavior ub2 ON ub1.goodid = ub2.goodid AND ub1.userid != ub2.userid WHERE ub1.userid = #{userid} AND ub1.behavior_type IN ('buy', 'favorite') AND ub2.behavior_type IN ('buy', 'favorite') GROUP BY ub2.userid ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 10
